recent_calls.summary: The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.
The user called and requested to speak to someone. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent to assist the user further.

The user called to follow up on scheduling an AC repair through their American Home Shield home warranty plan. The agent confirmed the details and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to renew a home warranty plan after letting their previous one lapse. The agent collected the user's address, contact information, and confirmed interest in the Total Home Warranty program before transferring the call to a live representative for immediate assistance.
The user called Budget and asked to speak with EJ or the office manager. The agent attempted to connect the user to the appropriate person and successfully transferred the call.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.

The user called to cancel an appointment at 6760 Lakeside Hills Drive, Florida, and provided the phone number associated with the appointment. The agent confirmed the details and assured the user that a human agent would follow up to confirm the cancellation. The call ended after the user acknowledged the confirmation.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the call was promptly transferred to another agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user called to inquire if the office was open and requested to speak with an estimator. The agent confirmed the office hours and successfully transferred the call to an estimator.
The call was very brief, with the user attempting to speak but hanging up almost immediately. No meaningful conversation or assistance took place.
The user called after hours and requested to speak to a live representative. The agent informed the user that it was outside regular business hours and that a live representative was not available.

Ken called to request a callback regarding an air conditioner that was recently fixed but is no longer working. He indicated that it needs to be looked at as soon as possible, though it is not an after-hours emergency. The agent confirmed the callback number and service address and initiated the emergency workflow.

Greg called to modify an upcoming appointment to include heating, air, and plumbing services, possibly split over two days. Since it was before business hours, the agent documented his request and arranged for a callback after 8 AM. Greg confirmed he did not need immediate emergency service and was satisfied with the callback arrangement.

The user called to check on the progress of the next interview. The agent informed the user that she could not provide interview updates but would pass the message to the team for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended with the user thanking the agent and no further requests made.

The user, Tracy Callahan, requested a regular service appointment for a water softener showing a code error three. The agent collected all necessary details including contact information and service address, and confirmed the appointment preference for the next day. Tracy declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended successfully with a promise of follow-up from the service team.

The user called to inquire about the arrival time of a service technician for central air conditioning repair, as no one had shown up or called yet. The agent confirmed the service type and location but the call ended abruptly before resolution.

The user informed the agent that they will be paying by check tomorrow. The agent acknowledged the information and explained that the team will follow up on the next business day regarding any timing details. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

The user, Cassandra, requested a cooling service appointment with a specific technician, Mister Patrick, who is familiar with her system. She described an ongoing issue with the cooling system not cooling the house and preferred a Wednesday morning appointment. The agent confirmed the details and assured Cassandra that the team would reach out to confirm the exact time.

The user, Arismalek, reported an urgent AC issue requiring immediate attention. The agent documented the issue, prioritized it for the next business day, and informed the user that no immediate dispatch was possible after hours. The user was reassured that the team would follow up promptly on the next business day.

The user, Judith, called to schedule an appointment and the agent began the process by asking for service details and preferred timing. The agent informed Judith that the request would be reviewed on the next business day for confirmation. The call ended shortly after without further details or confirmation.

The user, Stacie, called to schedule a service appointment for her air conditioner which is not working. The agent confirmed the details including contact number and service address, and informed Stacie that the team will reach out on the next business day to confirm the appointment. The call ended with the user expressing thanks.

The user, April Podus, called to request a service appointment for her air conditioner, which is running but not blowing cold air. The agent collected her contact and service address details and informed her that live transfers were not available after 4 PM, but a representative would call her back on the next business day.

The call was initiated by the user but had poor audio quality and was very brief. The agent identified themselves and asked for the reason for the call, but the user did not provide any clear information before hanging up.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no response from the user before the call ended.

The user called and was initially on hold with a virtual assistant. The agent, Evie, informed the user that the live team was not available for calls at that time and attempted to assist. The call ended shortly after without further resolution.

Greg Watkins called to schedule a comprehensive HVAC and plumbing service appointment for his property at 5728 Neosho Street, St. Louis. He requested evaluation and possible replacement of three upstairs window AC units, annual maintenance on the central air unit, an assessment of the upstairs ductwork and electrical for a new central air unit, and a plumbing evaluation for the gas water heater. The appointment was tentatively scheduled for Wednesday, July 8th at 10 AM, and the call was transferred to a live agent for further assistance.

The user provided their ZIP code and inquired if the agent was an AI bot. Upon confirmation, the user requested to be connected to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call.
The user called to discuss an estimate and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.

Timothy called to confirm and schedule a plumbing service for kitchen faucet installation. The agent booked an appointment for Thursday at 10 AM and informed Timothy about the dispatch fee and confirmation process. Timothy declined to provide feedback and ended the call.
The user called to confirm receiving a signed document and to schedule an appointment for Thursday. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak with Amy, and the agent promptly transferred the call to the appropriate live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to schedule a repair related to their American Home Shield home warranty, specifically for a cooling system issue. The agent confirmed the details and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further. The call ended with a successful transfer.

Stephanie called to request a standard cooling service for her HVAC system as the air was not cooling. The agent confirmed the correct service address and booked an appointment for the earliest available slot, which was the next day at 12 PM. The call concluded with the user declining to provide feedback.
The user, Dorian, called and requested to speak with someone. The agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Dorian, called to schedule a service appointment for central air cooling issues under their American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address and preferred appointment time, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The agent also mentioned home maintenance programs but did not confirm the user's interest.

Jim called to schedule a service appointment for an AC coil leak under his American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the correct service address and dispatch number, and informed Jim that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact him shortly. Jim declined additional information about maintenance programs and ended the call politely.
The user returned a call from Budget and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.

The user called to confirm that their request form, which was sent via text, was received. The agent acknowledged the confirmation and assured the user that the submission would be noted and passed along to the team. The call ended with the user having no further questions.

The user called to inquire about the specific time a service person would arrive, as previous appointments were missed. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.
Patricia Buchanan called to inquire about a scheduled air conditioner repair appointment. The agent acknowledged her request and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.

The user, Dorian, returned a phone call and was greeted by Sophie from Budget. Sophie acknowledged the return call and proceeded to transfer Dorian to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.

The user inquired about purchasing relays for home AC units. The agent informed the user that individual relays are not sold, but full HVAC system services are available and offered to schedule a service request. The call ended shortly after without scheduling.
The user requested to speak with a human representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully within a short call duration.
The user called to report that a scheduled appointment at 2 PM did not occur as expected. The agent apologized for the delay and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The call was very brief and the agent attempted to engage the user by offering assistance with heating, cooling, or plumbing services, but the user did not respond and hung up quickly.
